TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pow-la-tu " Ku-si-la a kamu. ő†őĽő¨ŌĄŌČőĹ nu Low-maay, Pl√°tŇćn, kitakit a ngiha, (pl√°t…Ēňźn), ayaw nu 429 a mihcaan atu ayaw nu 347 a mihcaan", singanganay nu Ku-Si-la sye-cya, Ya-tyen a tademaw, nisulitan niza hatu u masasakamuay a nikiluan, mipalekal tu singanganay a si-yen. Pow-la-tu nu Su-ke-la-tiay a mitudaday, nu Ye-li-tu-teay a saydan, tatulu kuheni u tabakiay tanektekay a nipatizeng nu macakatay a kanatal nu ce-sye, likisi a nipanganga "Si-bang-san-sen" anucaay "si-la-san-ce" han. nilaculan nikauzip (Ariston of Athens),śĮćŤ¶™śėĮŚüĻťáĆŚÖčÁďä(Perictione), . La-tu lecuh i kakitaanay a luma', u ama niza u A-li-s-tung "Ariston of Athens", u ina Pay-li-ke-cwng "Perictione" sakasepa nu luma'ay ciniza. labu nu luma' sakukamu nu Ku-ye-tyen u liluc nu hungti ciniza, ciniza u tawyaay aca Ya-tyen nu singanganay a cen-ce-cya u sinawawa ni Ke-li-ti-ya-s. zikuz duduc tu Low-maw mutesekay nu misulitay ci Ti-ow-ken-ni.La-al-siw a kamu, tada ngangan ni Pow-la-tu ci Ya-li-s-tow-le-s "Aristokles", zikuz zayhan u kidemu nu uzip niza a mapangangan Pow-la-tu han "i Si-la a kamuan, Platus a cudad "saenal, ahebal a imi" nika Ti-ow-ken-ni musakamu tu nuzuma a kamu, uyni Pow-la-tu a ngangan hakay u makayniay ahemalay pabesutay "platut√™s" a tinengn musakamu, anucaay zayhan ahebal ku zais niza. ayaw nu kung-yen 339 a mihcaan, Su-ke-la-ti masaybang a patayen, 28 ku mihcaan ni Pow-la-tu sakay tawyaay a cen-ce lice makesem nayay tu ku balucu', mahinisa malingatu tu midang hamin nu I-ta-li-subal, Si-si-li subal, Ay-ci, Si-lan-ni-cya a kitisaan mikilim tu sakatineng. u kamu 40 ku mihcaan niza hawsa, hakay ayaw nu kung-yan 387 a mihcaan pahezek ku piliwku panukas i Ioy-tyen, i likut nu Ioy-tyen satipan saamisan patizeng tu nu uzipay a cacudadan singanganay a Pow-la-tu sye-yen, uyni a sye-yen mala u nu si-bang nu macakatay nu saayaway mahedekay a sakaputan nu talakaway a a cacudadan, zikuza a zidayay u talakaway sinmung nu migingkiway a sakaput namahiza a singangan, u teban nu zidayan hawsa i Si-bang mapalekal ku aayaw nu talakaway a cacudadan. misabaluhay misannga'ŚČĶšĹú Pow-la-tu yadah ku misulitay tu masasakamuay a nikiluan malalamel ku nisulitan nu tademaw. i kinapinaan matatengil atu ayaw a malingatu a madademec, ci Pow-la-tu paliayaw misubelid i paazihan a laed atu tatukian, mcudaday taneng a milihiza amatapal. kasasakamu hina uyza cayay pilihiza atu saayaway tu nisasakamuay a tademaw a hamin nisulitan, hina katuuday a tademaw ku piazih mahamin matengil ku kunikasasakamu. Pow-la-tu a nizatengan tu kitakit śüŹśčČŚúĖÁöĄÁźÜśÉ≥šłĖÁēĆŤęĖ Pow-la-tu a nizatengan tu kitakit mituzu' u pitapal nu mita ayzaay a kitakit uyza u panukasay mipacing tu satalakaway nikakapah nu mikilidungay a kitakit. paayaw sa ci Pow-la-tu tuyni satalakaway kakapahay a kitakit ilabu izaw ku nizatengan tu kanatal, mahiniay a wayway tahkal tu tatenga'ay malikat caay ku mikilidungay dada', u maazihay nu mita likat adil nu cilal uyza u "takelal" uyza u panukas adil nu adingu. "li" huntu piazih u tahadaucay a tuud, u tatahadaucay cayay ka sumad kuheni, u bangcalay, u masaluimebngay. u kapahay a wayway kuheni, .' ku sasakamuen amapasumad a macakat. tinenganÁü•Ť≠ėŤęĖ Pow-la-tu i "Mey-no-pyen" sahecian a tinengan atu ninanaman u heci silalilidantu, nipitahawan niza tu kapahay damsayay mahicaay taneng a mapasubana' hakiya, atu mahicaay ku kapahay damsayay, micuyaku aca tu zazatengen atu pinanam maazih izaway tuk u tinengannamahiza mitatengil tu ahicaen micuyaku kuyzaan cayay kahapinan ku katahekalan nika malucek ku nipiazih "Right opinion". saca ci Pow-la-tu u tineng namakauzipay, namahiza pinanam uyza namahizaay nidimut i labu nu adinguay a nizateng makutkut patahkal, mahiniay pikutkutan hina malilid nu ce-sye-cya. palatatenga' ci Pow-la-tu paycacay a adingu i lecu hawsa sinikelid tu "damsay a wayway" atu sakay hamin a tuudan tu katineng, namahizayu minanam kuheni hawsa uyzasa uynian a tineng "kazatinga'". malilid ku ce-sye Śď≤Ś≠łŚĹĪťüŅ nizatengan ni Pow-la-tu hina palalecad atu u singanganay nu micudaday ci Ya-li-s-to-te, Pow-la-tu singangan i teban zidayan tu saayaway mahami matahpu ni Ya-li-s-to-te.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == pow-r~…ĺa-tu " ku-si-r~…ĺa a kamu. ****** nu r~…ĺow-maaj, pr~…ĺ*t*n, kitakit a Ňčińßa, (pr~…ĺ*t**n), ajaw nu *** a mińß ¶aan atu ajaw nu *** a mińß ¶aan", siŇčaŇčanaj nu ku-si-r~…ĺa sj…ô- ¶ja, ja-tj…ôn a tad…ômaw, nisur~…ĺitan niza ńßatu u masasakamuaj a nikir~…ĺuan, mipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu siŇčaŇčanaj a si-j…ôn. pow-r~…ĺa-tu nu su-k…ô-r~…ĺa-tiaj a mitudadaj, nu j…ô-r~…ĺi-tu-t…ôaj a sajdan, tatur~…ĺu kuńß…ôni u tabakiaj tan…ôkt…ôkaj a nipatiz…ôŇč nu ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶…ô-sj…ô, r~…ĺikisi a nipaŇčaŇča "si-baŇč-san-s…ôn" anu ¶aaj "si-r~…ĺa-san- ¶…ô" ńßan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nikauzip (ariston of atńß…ôns),*******(p…ôri ¶tion…ô), . r~…ĺa-tu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i kakitaanaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u ama niza u a-r~…ĺi-s-tuŇč "ariston of atńß…ôns", u ina paj-r~…ĺi-k…ô- ¶wŇč "p…ôri ¶tion…ô" sakas…ôpa nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj ¶iniza. r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sakukamu nu ku-j…ô-tj…ôn u r~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶ nu ńßuŇčti ¶iniza, ¶iniza u tawjaaj a ¶a ja-tj…ôn nu siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶ja u sinawawa ni k…ô-r~…ĺi-ti-ja-s. zikuz dudu ¶ tu r~…ĺow-maw mut…ôs…ôkaj nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i ti-ow-k…ôn-ni.r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ-siw a kamu, tada ŇčaŇčan ni pow-r~…ĺa-tu ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-s-tow-r~…ĺ…ô-s "aristokr~…ĺ…ôs", zikuz zajńßan u kid…ômu nu uzip niza a mapaŇčaŇčan pow-r~…ĺa-tu ńßan "i si-r~…ĺa a kamuan, pr~…ĺatus a ¶udad "sa…ônar~…ĺ, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ a imi" nika ti-ow-k…ôn-ni musakamu tu nuzuma a kamu, ujni pow-r~…ĺa-tu a ŇčaŇčan ńßakaj u makajniaj ańß…ômar~…ĺaj pab…ôsutaj "pr~…ĺatut*s" a tin…ôŇčn musakamu, anu ¶aaj zajńßan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku zais niza. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, su-k…ô-r~…ĺa-ti masajbaŇč a pataj…ôn, ** ku mińß ¶aan ni pow-r~…ĺa-tu sakaj tawjaaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô r~…ĺi ¶…ô mak…ôs…ôm najaj tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, mańßinisa mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu midaŇč ńßamin nu i-ta-r~…ĺi-subar~…ĺ, si-si-r~…ĺi subar~…ĺ, aj- ¶i, si-r~…ĺan-ni- ¶ja a kitisaan mikir~…ĺim tu sakatin…ôŇč. u kamu ** ku mińß ¶aan niza ńßawsa, ńßakaj ajaw nu kuŇč-jan *** a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk ku pir~…ĺiwku panukas i ioj-tj…ôn, i r~…ĺikut nu ioj-tj…ôn satipan saamisan patiz…ôŇč tu nu uzipaj a ¶a ¶udadan siŇčaŇčanaj a pow-r~…ĺa-tu sj…ô-j…ôn, ujni a sj…ô-j…ôn mar~…ĺa u nu si-baŇč nu ma ¶akataj nu saajawaj mańß…ôd…ôkaj a sakaputan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a a ¶a ¶udadan, zikuza a zidajaj u tar~…ĺakawaj sinmuŇč nu migiŇčkiwaj a sakaput namańßiza a siŇčaŇčan, u t…ôban nu zidajan ńßawsa i si-baŇč mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku aajaw nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan. misabar~…ĺuńßaj misanŇča Ē~ °** pow-r~…ĺa-tu jadańß ku misur~…ĺitaj tu masasakamuaj a nikir~…ĺuan mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ku nisur~…ĺitan nu tad…ômaw. i kinapinaan matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ atu ajaw a mar~…ĺiŇčatu a madad…ôm…ô ¶, ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu par~…ĺiajaw misub…ôr~…ĺid i paazińßan a r~…ĺa…ôd atu tatukian, m ¶udadaj tan…ôŇč a mir~…ĺińßiza amatapar~…ĺ. kasasakamu ńßina ujza ¶ajaj pir~…ĺińßiza atu saajawaj tu nisasakamuaj a tad…ômaw a ńßamin nisur~…ĺitan, ńßina katuudaj a tad…ômaw ku piazińß mańßamin mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ku kunikasasakamu. pow-r~…ĺa-tu a nizat…ôŇčan tu kitakit ********* pow-r~…ĺa-tu a nizat…ôŇčan tu kitakit mituzu Ē~ ° u pitapar~…ĺ nu mita ajzaaj a kitakit ujza u panukasaj mipa ¶iŇč tu satar~…ĺakawaj nikakapańß nu mikir~…ĺiduŇčaj a kitakit. paajaw sa ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu tujni satar~…ĺakawaj kakapańßaj a kitakit ir~…ĺabu izaw ku nizat…ôŇčan tu kanatar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj a wajwaj tańßkar~…ĺ tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj mar~…ĺikat ¶aaj ku mikir~…ĺiduŇčaj dada Ē~ °, u maazińßaj nu mita r~…ĺikat adir~…ĺ nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ujza u "tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ" ujza u panukas adir~…ĺ nu adiŇču. "r~…ĺi" ńßuntu piazińß u tańßadau ¶aj a tuud, u tatańßadau ¶aj ¶ajaj ka sumad kuńß…ôni, u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj, u masar~…ĺuim…ôbŇčaj. u kapańßaj a wajwaj kuńß…ôni, . Ē~ ° ku sasakamu…ôn amapasumad a ma ¶akat. tin…ôŇčan*** pow-r~…ĺa-tu i "m…ô-no-pj…ôn" sańß…ô ¶ian a tin…ôŇčan atu ninanaman u ńß…ô ¶i sir~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺidantu, nipitańßawan niza tu kapańßaj damsajaj mańßi ¶aaj tan…ôŇč a mapasubana Ē~ ° ńßakija, atu mańßi ¶aaj ku kapańßaj damsajaj, mi ¶ujaku a ¶a tu zazat…ôŇč…ôn atu pinanam maazińß izawaj tuk u tin…ôŇčannamańßiza mitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ańßi ¶a…ôn mi ¶ujaku kujzaan ¶ajaj kańßapinan ku katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nika mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku nipiazińß "*igńßt opinion". sa ¶a ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu u tin…ôŇč namakauzipaj, namańßiza pinanam ujza namańßizaaj nidimut i r~…ĺabu nu adiŇčuaj a nizat…ôŇč makutkut patańßkar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj pikutkutan ńßina mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja. par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu paj ¶a ¶aj a adiŇču i r~…ĺ…ô ¶u ńßawsa sinik…ôr~…ĺid tu "damsaj a wajwaj" atu sakaj ńßamin a tuudan tu katin…ôŇč, namańßizaju minanam kuńß…ôni ńßawsa ujzasa ujnian a tin…ôŇč "kazatiŇča Ē~ °". mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku ¶…ô-sj…ô **** nizat…ôŇčan ni pow-r~…ĺa-tu ńßina par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu u siŇčaŇčanaj nu mi ¶udadaj ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-s-to-t…ô, pow-r~…ĺa-tu siŇčaŇčan i t…ôban zidajan tu saajawaj mańßami matańßpu ni ja-r~…ĺi-s-to-t…ô.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pow-la-tu " Ku-si-la a kamu. ő†őĽő¨ŌĄŌČőĹ nu Low-maay, Pl√°tŇćn, kitakit a ngiha, (pl√°t…Ēňźn), ayaw nu 429 a mihcaan atu ayaw nu 347 a mihcaan", singanganay nu Ku-Si-la sye-cya, Ya-tyen a tademaw, nisulitan niza hatu u masasakamuay a nikiluan, mipalekal tu singanganay a si-yen. Pow-la-tu nu Su-ke-la-tiay a mitudaday, nu Ye-li-tu-teay a saydan, tatulu kuheni u tabakiay tanektekay a nipatizeng nu macakatay a kanatal nu ce-sye, likisi a nipanganga "Si-bang-san-sen" anucaay "si-la-san-ce" han. nilaculan nikauzip (Ariston of Athens),śĮćŤ¶™śėĮŚüĻťáĆŚÖčÁďä(Perictione), . La-tu lecuh i kakitaanay a luma', u ama niza u A-li-s-tung "Ariston of Athens", u ina Pay-li-ke-cwng "Perictione" sakasepa nu luma'ay ciniza. labu nu luma' sakukamu nu Ku-ye-tyen u liluc nu hungti ciniza, ciniza u tawyaay aca Ya-tyen nu singanganay a cen-ce-cya u sinawawa ni Ke-li-ti-ya-s. zikuz duduc tu Low-maw mutesekay nu misulitay ci Ti-ow-ken-ni.La-al-siw a kamu, tada ngangan ni Pow-la-tu ci Ya-li-s-tow-le-s "Aristokles", zikuz zayhan u kidemu nu uzip niza a mapangangan Pow-la-tu han "i Si-la a kamuan, Platus a cudad "saenal, ahebal a imi" nika Ti-ow-ken-ni musakamu tu nuzuma a kamu, uyni Pow-la-tu a ngangan hakay u makayniay ahemalay pabesutay "platut√™s" a tinengn musakamu, anucaay zayhan ahebal ku zais niza. ayaw nu kung-yen 339 a mihcaan, Su-ke-la-ti masaybang a patayen, 28 ku mihcaan ni Pow-la-tu sakay tawyaay a cen-ce lice makesem nayay tu ku balucu', mahinisa malingatu tu midang hamin nu I-ta-li-subal, Si-si-li subal, Ay-ci, Si-lan-ni-cya a kitisaan mikilim tu sakatineng. u kamu 40 ku mihcaan niza hawsa, hakay ayaw nu kung-yan 387 a mihcaan pahezek ku piliwku panukas i Ioy-tyen, i likut nu Ioy-tyen satipan saamisan patizeng tu nu uzipay a cacudadan singanganay a Pow-la-tu sye-yen, uyni a sye-yen mala u nu si-bang nu macakatay nu saayaway mahedekay a sakaputan nu talakaway a a cacudadan, zikuza a zidayay u talakaway sinmung nu migingkiway a sakaput namahiza a singangan, u teban nu zidayan hawsa i Si-bang mapalekal ku aayaw nu talakaway a cacudadan. misabaluhay misannga'ŚČĶšĹú Pow-la-tu yadah ku misulitay tu masasakamuay a nikiluan malalamel ku nisulitan nu tademaw. i kinapinaan matatengil atu ayaw a malingatu a madademec, ci Pow-la-tu paliayaw misubelid i paazihan a laed atu tatukian, mcudaday taneng a milihiza amatapal. kasasakamu hina uyza cayay pilihiza atu saayaway tu nisasakamuay a tademaw a hamin nisulitan, hina katuuday a tademaw ku piazih mahamin matengil ku kunikasasakamu. Pow-la-tu a nizatengan tu kitakit śüŹśčČŚúĖÁöĄÁźÜśÉ≥šłĖÁēĆŤęĖ Pow-la-tu a nizatengan tu kitakit mituzu' u pitapal nu mita ayzaay a kitakit uyza u panukasay mipacing tu satalakaway nikakapah nu mikilidungay a kitakit. paayaw sa ci Pow-la-tu tuyni satalakaway kakapahay a kitakit ilabu izaw ku nizatengan tu kanatal, mahiniay a wayway tahkal tu tatenga'ay malikat caay ku mikilidungay dada', u maazihay nu mita likat adil nu cilal uyza u "takelal" uyza u panukas adil nu adingu. "li" huntu piazih u tahadaucay a tuud, u tatahadaucay cayay ka sumad kuheni, u bangcalay, u masaluimebngay. u kapahay a wayway kuheni, .' ku sasakamuen amapasumad a macakat. tinenganÁü•Ť≠ėŤęĖ Pow-la-tu i "Mey-no-pyen" sahecian a tinengan atu ninanaman u heci silalilidantu, nipitahawan niza tu kapahay damsayay mahicaay taneng a mapasubana' hakiya, atu mahicaay ku kapahay damsayay, micuyaku aca tu zazatengen atu pinanam maazih izaway tuk u tinengannamahiza mitatengil tu ahicaen micuyaku kuyzaan cayay kahapinan ku katahekalan nika malucek ku nipiazih "Right opinion". saca ci Pow-la-tu u tineng namakauzipay, namahiza pinanam uyza namahizaay nidimut i labu nu adinguay a nizateng makutkut patahkal, mahiniay pikutkutan hina malilid nu ce-sye-cya. palatatenga' ci Pow-la-tu paycacay a adingu i lecu hawsa sinikelid tu "damsay a wayway" atu sakay hamin a tuudan tu katineng, namahizayu minanam kuheni hawsa uyzasa uynian a tineng "kazatinga'". malilid ku ce-sye Śď≤Ś≠łŚĹĪťüŅ nizatengan ni Pow-la-tu hina palalecad atu u singanganay nu micudaday ci Ya-li-s-to-te, Pow-la-tu singangan i teban zidayan tu saayaway mahami matahpu ni Ya-li-s-to-te.

paj-r~…ĺi-k…ô- ¶wŇč "p…ôri ¶tion…ô" sakas…ôpa nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj ¶iniza. r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sakukamu nu ku-j…ô-tj…ôn u r~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶ nu ńßuŇčti ¶iniza, ¶iniza u tawjaaj a ¶a ja-tj…ôn nu siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶ja u sinawawa ni k…ô-r~…ĺi-ti-ja-s. zikuz dudu ¶ tu r~…ĺow-maw mut…ôs…ôkaj nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i ti-ow-k…ôn-ni.r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ-siw a kamu, tada ŇčaŇčan ni pow-r~…ĺa-tu ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-s-tow-r~…ĺ…ô-s "aristokr~…ĺ…ôs", zikuz zajńßan u kid…ômu nu uzip niza a mapaŇčaŇčan pow-r~…ĺa-tu ńßan "i si-r~…ĺa a kamuan, pr~…ĺatus a ¶udad "sa…ônar~…ĺ, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ a imi" nika ti-ow-k…ôn-ni musakamu tu nuzuma a kamu, ujni pow-r~…ĺa-tu a ŇčaŇčan ńßakaj u makajniaj ańß…ômar~…ĺaj pab…ôsutaj "pr~…ĺatut*s" a tin…ôŇčn musakamu, anu ¶aaj zajńßan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku zais niza. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, su-k…ô-r~…ĺa-ti masajbaŇč a pataj…ôn, ** ku mińß ¶aan ni pow-r~…ĺa-tu sakaj tawjaaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô r~…ĺi ¶…ô mak…ôs…ôm najaj tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, mańßinisa mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu midaŇč ńßamin nu i-ta-r~…ĺi-subar~…ĺ, si-si-r~…ĺi subar~…ĺ, aj- ¶i, si-r~…ĺan-ni- ¶ja a kitisaan mikir~…ĺim tu sakatin…ôŇč. u kamu ** ku mińß ¶aan niza ńßawsa, ńßakaj ajaw nu kuŇč-jan *** a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk ku pir~…ĺiwku panukas i ioj-tj…ôn, i r~…ĺikut nu ioj-tj…ôn satipan saamisan patiz…ôŇč tu nu uzipaj a ¶a ¶udadan siŇčaŇčanaj a pow-r~…ĺa-tu sj…ô-j…ôn, ujni a sj…ô-j…ôn mar~…ĺa u nu si-baŇč nu ma ¶akataj nu saajawaj mańß…ôd…ôkaj a sakaputan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a a ¶a ¶udadan, zikuza a zidajaj u tar~…ĺakawaj sinmuŇč nu migiŇčkiwaj a sakaput namańßiza a siŇčaŇčan, u t…ôban nu zidajan ńßawsa i si-baŇč mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku aajaw nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan. misabar~…ĺuńßaj misanŇča Ē~ °** pow-r~…ĺa-tu jadańß ku misur~…ĺitaj tu masasakamuaj a nikir~…ĺuan mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ku nisur~…ĺitan nu tad…ômaw. i kinapinaan matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ atu ajaw a mar~…ĺiŇčatu a madad…ôm…ô ¶, ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu par~…ĺiajaw misub…ôr~…ĺid i paazińßan a r~…ĺa…ôd atu tatukian, m ¶udadaj tan…ôŇč a mir~…ĺińßiza amatapar~…ĺ. kasasakamu ńßina ujza ¶ajaj pir~…ĺińßiza atu saajawaj tu nisasakamuaj a tad…ômaw a ńßamin nisur~…ĺitan, ńßina katuudaj a tad…ômaw ku piazińß mańßamin mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ku kunikasasakamu. pow-r~…ĺa-tu a nizat…ôŇčan tu kitakit ********* pow-r~…ĺa-tu a nizat…ôŇčan tu kitakit mituzu Ē~ ° u pitapar~…ĺ nu mita ajzaaj a kitakit ujza u panukasaj mipa ¶iŇč tu satar~…ĺakawaj nikakapańß nu mikir~…ĺiduŇčaj a kitakit. paajaw sa ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu tujni satar~…ĺakawaj kakapańßaj a kitakit ir~…ĺabu izaw ku nizat…ôŇčan tu kanatar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj a wajwaj tańßkar~…ĺ tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj mar~…ĺikat ¶aaj ku mikir~…ĺiduŇčaj dada Ē~ °, u maazińßaj nu mita r~…ĺikat adir~…ĺ nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ujza u "tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ" ujza u panukas adir~…ĺ nu adiŇču. "r~…ĺi" ńßuntu piazińß u tańßadau ¶aj a tuud, u tatańßadau ¶aj ¶ajaj ka sumad kuńß…ôni, u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj, u masar~…ĺuim…ôbŇčaj. u kapańßaj a wajwaj kuńß…ôni, . Ē~ ° ku sasakamu…ôn amapasumad a ma ¶akat. tin…ôŇčan*** pow-r~…ĺa-tu i "m…ô-no-pj…ôn" sańß…ô ¶ian a tin…ôŇčan atu ninanaman u ńß…ô ¶i sir~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺidantu, nipitańßawan niza tu kapańßaj damsajaj mańßi ¶aaj tan…ôŇč a mapasubana Ē~ ° ńßakija, atu mańßi ¶aaj ku kapańßaj damsajaj, mi ¶ujaku a ¶a tu zazat…ôŇč…ôn atu pinanam maazińß izawaj tuk u tin…ôŇčannamańßiza mitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ańßi ¶a…ôn mi ¶ujaku kujzaan ¶ajaj kańßapinan ku katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nika mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku nipiazińß "*igńßt opinion". sa ¶a ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu u tin…ôŇč namakauzipaj, namańßiza pinanam ujza namańßizaaj nidimut i r~…ĺabu nu adiŇčuaj a nizat…ôŇč makutkut patańßkar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj pikutkutan ńßina mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja. par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-tu paj ¶a ¶aj a adiŇču i r~…ĺ…ô ¶u ńßawsa sinik…ôr~…ĺid tu "damsaj a wajwaj" atu sakaj ńßamin a tuudan tu katin…ôŇč, namańßizaju minanam kuńß…ôni ńßawsa ujzasa ujnian a tin…ôŇč "kazatiŇča Ē~ °". mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku ¶…ô-sj…ô **** nizat…ôŇčan ni pow-r~…ĺa-tu ńßina par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu u siŇčaŇčanaj nu mi ¶udadaj ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-s-to-t…ô, pow-r~…ĺa-tu siŇčaŇčan i t…ôban zidajan tu saajawaj mańßami matańßpu ni ja-r~…ĺi-s-to-t…ô.
